productDisplayName: Femella Women Navy Blue Printed Dress
description: Style Note Strikingly chic, this dress from femella is a detail-oriented deconstruction of a wardrobe essential. Offering a flowy silhouette, you can pair this one with pair of strappy sandals for the most flattering look. Product Details Blue floral printed sleeveless dress, has a narrow collar, chest buttoned placket, gathered skirt and a cut out detail at the back Material and Care Blended fabric Cold wash with like colours Do not iron, bleach or wring Dry inside out Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M which measures 85 cm from shoulder to the hem
